description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND the user selects an SVOD to watch

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Rewind
AND presses the "O" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Rewind was initiated
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
